chosen_action.title: Deliver live-ready StackOverflow answer packet for immediate manual placement
chosen_action.question_title: How should I structure autonomous AI agent workflows for production reliability in a TypeScript/Next.js fintech platform?

why_this_action.summary: External autonomous lanes are either blocked or already inside active measurement windows, while a current high-intent StackOverflow packet is ready for authenticated human placement now.

expected_outcome: Immediate manual placement of the answer on StackOverflow, creating a qualified demand-capture path to Codeberg-first repo surfaces.

measurement_window.success_metric: Answer is posted live, then any attributable qualified repo inspection or Codeberg adoption movement.
measurement_window.kill_condition: If still unplaced by the review checkpoint, replace this lane instead of refreshing the same packet again.
